patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (DOB 05/05/1952). Active problems documented 06/30/2023 include mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension (benign), postoperative anemia / unspecified anemia, and leg pain. Significant labs on 07/03/2023 show ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H), iron 41 ug/dL (L) with iron saturation 15% (L), triglycerides 158 mg/dL (H) and VLDL 32 mg/dL (H). Basic metabolic panel notable for chloride 108 mmol/L (H), anion gap 5.0 mmol/L (L), and eGFR CKD-EPI 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (L). Functional assessment documents difficulty walking/climbing stairs. Primary care provider is Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP). Multiple upcoming specialty and primary care appointments are listed (April–November 2024). Mental health screens (PHQ-2 and PHQ-9) recorded 03/28/2023 with scores of 0.
